creator: godevilove@ya.ru
text:
Just tried - yeah, no crash with openjpeg 2.1.2_1, only warnings:
a lot of these:
warning: openjpeg warning: Found a misplaced 'cmap' box outside jp2h box
warning: openjpeg warning: Non conformant codestream TPsot==TNsot.
warning: openjpeg warning: No incltree created.
warning: openjpeg warning: No imsbtree created.
warning: openjpeg warning: tgt_create tree->numnodes == 0, no tree created.
